mnemonics: Master Blockchain by IMagining A BASHing IRon (Imran Bashir) core structure.
keyPoints: The book provides a comprehensive technical foundation.
It covers consensus mechanisms like Proof-of-Work and Proof-of-Stake.
It delves into advanced topics such as cryptography and decentralized applications.
commonMistakes: Misspelling the title as 'Mastering' or the author as 'Emran' or 'Bashar'.
Assuming the book is only about Bitcoin, when it covers blockchain technology more broadly.
Confusing it with a simpler, non-technical introductory guide.
